name: corpusgraph
description: Document ETL and entity relationship engine for AI agents. CorpusGraph handles what agents can't do alone: OCR, parsing, entity extraction, and relationship graphing across 1,000+ file formats. Feed it PDFs, emails, images, Parquet, CSV, ORC, JSON, or Office docs — the platform normalizes everything into searchable, structured data, extracts 30+ entity types, and builds a relationship graph mapping connections across the entire corpus. Agents get clean, queryable results instead of struggling with raw files. Processing-aware responses prevent hallucination about incomplete data. Built on the Ingestigate platform.
author: Ingestigate Inc.

INGESTIGATE_TOKEN.description: Short-lived access token for API authentication. Expires in 30 minutes.
